title: Implement Social Sign-Up Buttons
description: Add Google and Apple Sign-In buttons to the registration flow.
instructions:
Extend the registration screen with social sign-up options:

1. Create SocialSignUpButtons widget that displays:
   - 'Sign up with Google' button (with Google logo)
   - 'Sign up with Apple' button (with Apple logo, iOS only)
   - Proper error handling for each provider

2. Implement the sign-up flow:
   - User taps button → authenticate with provider
   - On success, send token to your Serverpod backend
   - Backend verifies token and creates/returns user account
   - Navigate to home screen on success

3. Handle edge cases:
   - User already has account with this email (link accounts or show login)
   - User cancels the sign-in flow
   - Network errors during token exchange

hints.text: Use the google_sign_in and sign_in_with_apple packages. Remember Apple Sign-In is required if you have any other social login.
After getting the auth credential, pass the ID token to your Serverpod backend for verification.
For account linking, check if the email already exists. If so, offer to link the social account to the existing account.
